entity.summary: Cross-chain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange centered on Bifrost Network, with swaps, pools, LP rewards, and cross-chain asset access.
entity.notes: Current first-party application exposes Swap, Pool, LP Reward, Overview, wallet connection, and launch-app access. DefiLlama reports current Bifrost Network TVL and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: Everdex official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes active Swap, Pool, LP Reward, Overview, wallet connection, and launch-app surfaces.

evidence.title: Everdex metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies Everdex as a Bifrost Network cross-chain AMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and non-zero recent DEX volume.

evidence.title: Everdex exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus independently preserves Everdex under the everdex.app domain.
